nameMeanings.name: Crossland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in the parish of Almondbury, Yorkshire, named Crosland, from Old English cros ‘cross’ + land ‘newly cultivated land’.

variants.name: Croslin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Crossland  .

variants.name: Crosslin

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Crossland was born in 1429, in Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Crossland, was 23 and his mother, Lady Richard Crossland, was 19. He had at least 1 son with Margaret W McNelly. He died in 1455, in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret W McNelly. Il est décédé en 1455, à Almondbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Crossland(이)가 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 크로슬랜드 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Crossland(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Richard Crossland(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Margaret W McNelly(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 알몽버이에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.
